title: Neobank account takeover class action reaches new plaintiffs
snippet: A class action against a major mobile banking app has added 2,400 new plaintiffs alleging inadequate security measures led to unauthorized account access and fund theft.

title: CFPB issues enforcement order against mobile banking app
snippet: The CFPB has ordered a fintech company to pay $8.5M in restitution for charging hidden fees and failing to process dispute claims within required timelines.

title: FTC investigation into BNPL hidden fees expands
snippet: The Federal Trade Commission has expanded its investigation into buy-now-pay-later providers, citing undisclosed late fees and misleading APR representations affecting millions of consumers.

title: Reddit r/personalfinance: widespread complaints about account freezes
snippet: Multiple users reporting their neobank accounts frozen for weeks without explanation during compliance reviews, unable to access funds for rent and essential expenses.

title: FDIC consumer protection report cites fintech apps
snippet: FDIC's 2026 report highlights growing consumer protection concerns with fintech banking apps, including inadequate dispute resolution and misleading deposit insurance claims.

title: SEC charges crypto exchange with unregistered securities
snippet: The SEC has filed charges against a cryptocurrency exchange for offering unregistered securities and failing to protect customer assets in segregated accounts.

title: BBB complaints surge for neobanks over dispute resolution
snippet: Better Business Bureau reports a 280% increase in complaints against digital-first banks, primarily regarding fraud dispute handling and customer service accessibility.
